parsed.recommendation_text: For an audiophile prioritizing sound quality and battery life, the Sennheiser Momentum 4 stands out. It offers exceptional audio fidelity with a balanced tuning that appeals to discerning listeners. The 60-hour battery life ensures extended listening sessions without recharging. While it lacks some comfort compared to Sony's XM5, its audiophile-leaning sound signature makes up for any minor drawbacks.
parsed.selection_rationale: Sennheiser Momentum 4 offers the best audio quality and longest battery life.
